articles.author: Mark Carlson, Lorne Cook
articles.title: NATO allies bewildered by Trump’s about-face on US troop moves in Europe - AP News
articles.description: NATO allies and defense officials have expressed bewilderment at U.S. President Donald Trump’s announcement that he would send 5,000 U.S. troops to Poland. That came just weeks after he ordered the same number of forces pulled out of Europe. The apparent chan…
articles.content: HELSINGBORG, Sweden (AP) NATO allies and defense officials expressed bewilderment Friday at U.S. President Donald Trumps announcement that he would send 5,000 U.S. troops to Poland just weeks after o… [+4579 chars]

articles.author: Hugh Leask, Chloe Taylor
articles.title: Puig plunges after Estée Lauder tie-up talks terminated; European stocks rise - CNBC
articles.description: European stocks pushed higher on Friday as investors monitor the U.S.-Iran war and a slew of economic data.
articles.content:
LONDON Shares listed in Europe moved higher on Friday, with the U.S.-Iran war and economic data in focus.
The pan-European Stoxx 600 was up 0.6% shortly after 3:10 p.m. in London (10:10 a.m. E.T.). … [+2377 chars]
